Headline: Software Quality Automation Engineer | AI Agent Testing | Playwright & Modern Frameworks | Automated & Manual QA | Open to Work in Canada

Demonstrated Impact: At TeKnowledge, I designed a Selenium automation suite that reduced regression execution time by 45%. What I Test: • Complex enterprise software and web applications (React architectures, Contentful CMS). • Backend infrastructure and APIs. • Modern AI agent platforms (evaluating structural prompts and non-deterministic conversational flows). Test Techniques Applied: • Black-Box Techniques: Utilizing Equivalence Partitioning (EP), Boundary Value Analysis (BVA), and State Transition testing to achieve optimal test coverage efficiently. • Experience-Based Techniques: Leveraging structured Exploratory Testing and Error Guessing to uncover edge-case defects that scripted testing might miss.  Test Process & Project Management: • Test Process: Operating strictly within the fundamental test process—from Test Planning, Analysis, and Design through to Implementation, Execution, and Test Completion. • Management Style: Fully integrated into Agile/Scrum environments. I actively participate in sprint planning, backlog refinement, and daily stand-ups to ensure quality is embedded early in the Software Development Lifecycle (SDLC) (the "Shift-Left" approach).  Education & Background: • Master of Information Technology – University of Peradeniya • BSc in Management Information Systems – University College Dublin (GPA 3.45)  I am a Permanent Resident based in Winnipeg, MB, actively seeking remote, hybrid, or on-site QA Analyst and QA Engineer roles across Canada.
